- Richard R. Ernst (NMR spectroscopy, Chemistry) - ETH Zurich but also associated with Harvard
- Richard J. Roberts (Physiology/Medicine) - Harvard
- William D. Phillips (Physics) - Harvard
- Mario R. Capecchi (Physiology/Medicine) - Harvard
- Robert J. Lefkowitz (Chemistry) - Cornell
- David J. Wineland (Physics) - Harvard
- Richard H. Thaler (Economics) - Harvard
- Frances H. Arnold (Chemistry) - Princeton

Note: Actual results would show 50 entries when executed properly on a working endpoint.
